/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wshadow -Wformat=2      -Wstrict-prototypes -Wmissing-prototypes -Wconversion -g3 -O0 -fsanitize=undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer CMakeFiles/mysh.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/mysh.dir/src/init/config.c.o CMakeFiles/mysh.dir/src/lexer/lexer.c.o CMakeFiles/mysh.dir/src/parser/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/mysh.dir/src/expand/expand.c.o CMakeFiles/mysh.dir/src/executor/exec.c.o CMakeFiles/mysh.dir/src/jobs/jobs.c.o CMakeFiles/mysh.dir/src/linenoise/linenoise.c.o -o mysh
